zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham於1346年4月出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Robert de Tudenham51歲，母親Katherine De Pateshull37歲。他於1371年與Margaret Weyland在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1392年4月在英國英格蘭素福爾可凱丁頓享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可艾利斯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham于1346年4月出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可时，他的父亲Robert de Tudenham51岁，母亲Katherine De Pateshull37岁。他于1371年与Margaret Weyland在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1392年4月在英国英格兰素福爾可凱丁頓享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可艾利斯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tudenham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tuddenham
meanings: English: locative name, principally from from East or West Tuddenham (Norfolk), but also from Tuddenham (Suffolk) or Tuddenham Saint Martin (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Oxborough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Oxborough in Norfolk, which is recorded as Oxeburg in 1194. The placename derives from Old English oxa ‘ox’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham was born in April 1346, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Tudenham, was 51 and his mother, Katherine De Pateshull, was 37. He married Margaret Weyland in 1371, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in April 1392, in Kedington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Eriswell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham est né en avril 1346, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Tudenham, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Katherine De Pateshull, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Weyland en 1371, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1392, à Kedington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Eriswell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham im April 1346 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tudenham 51 und seine Mutter Katherine De Pateshull 37. Er hat 1371 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Weyland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im April 1392 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Kedington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Eriswell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham è nato il nel aprile 1346 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Tudenham, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Katherine De Pateshull, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Weyland nel 1371, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1392, nel Kedington, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Eriswell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenhamが1346年4月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Robert de Tudenhamは51歳，母Katherine De Pateshullは37歳であった。1371年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでMargaret Weylandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1392年4月にイギリスイギリススフォルクケディントンで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクエリスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham(이)가 1346년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tudenham(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine De Pateshull(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Margaret Weyland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1392년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 케딩턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 에리스웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham nasceu em abril de 1346, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Tudenham, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Katherine De Pateshull, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Weyland em 1371, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1392, em Kedington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Eriswell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham родился апрель 1346 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Tudenham было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine De Pateshull, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Weyland в 1371 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер апрель 1392 г. в местности кедингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности эрисвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham nació en abril de 1346, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Tudenham, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Katherine De Pateshull, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret Weyland en 1371, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1392, en Kedington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Eriswell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
